ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Note identifier related to the tracking data */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being tracked */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver operating the vehicle */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the time of tracking */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time duration for the tracking data */,
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the anomaly detected during tracking */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Route identifier associated with the tracking data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vehicle at the time of tracking */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption during the tracking period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tracking entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_note_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_id") REFERENCES notes ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_anomaly_id FOREIGN KEY ("anomaly_id") REFERENCES anomalies ("anomaly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or details about the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., van, truck, car) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle assigned to the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the route */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time duration for the route */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle that received maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintainer" TEXT /* Name of the person or organization that performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Driver, Fleet Manager, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle assigned */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment ended (null if still assigned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., Created, Updated, Deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)
